---
title: Ömür Uğur
email: ougur@metu.edu.tr
image: images/photos/omur-ugur.png
groups: [Computational Finance, 
         Data Analysis,
         Differential Equations,
         Optimisation and Control,]
projects: [Data-Driven and Physics-Informed Models,
           Dynamical Systems and Control,
           Portfolio Optimisation and Management,
           Surrogate Models and Optimisation,]
           # Newton’s Second Law of Motion; Compartmental Models of Epidemiology; Controlling the Trajectory of a Motion; Equations of Mathematical Physics; Synthetic Market Data Generation and Simulation; Mean-Variance Portfolio Optimisation; Option (Derivative) Pricing; Stochastic Differential Equations (with Jump Processes); General-Purpose Data-Fitted Surrogate Models; Linear and Nonlinear Time-Series Models]
about:
  template: trestles
# jolla
# trestles 
# solana
# marquee X
# broadside
  #image: photos/omur-ugur.png
  links:
    - icon: house
      text: Home
      href: https://ougur.iam.metu.edu.tr
      target: "_blank"
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-Mail
      href: mailto:ougur@metu.edu.tr
    - icon: cup-fill
      text: Gitea
      href: https://ougur.iam.metu.edu.tr/gitea/ougur
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ougur-phd
status: active
---

I was born in Istanbul in 1971. I graduated from the [Department of Mathematics][MATH]{target="_blank"}, [Middle East Technical University][METU]{target="_blank"} (METU) and took my BS degree in 1995. 

I received my MSc degree in Mathematics in 1998, with a thesis entitled "[Hypervirial Analysis of Enclosed Quantum Mechanical Systems][ouMSc]{target="_blank"}", and my PhD degree in Mathematics, with a thesis entitled "[Boundary Value Problems for Higher Order Linear Impulsive Differential Equations][ouPhD]{target="_blank"}", in 2003.

Presently, I am a member of the faculty at the [Institute of Applied Mathematics][IAM]{target="_blank"}, [Middle East Technical University][METU]{target="_blank"}.

My Academic Homepage is located at [ougur.iam.metu.edu.tr][OUGUR]{target="_blank"}.


[OUGUR]: https://ougur.iam.metu.edu.tr
[MATH]: https://math.metu.edu.tr
[IAM]: https://iam.metu.edu.tr
[METU]: https://metu.edu.tr
[ouMSc]: https://ougur.iam.metu.edu.tr/publications/theses/hypervirial-analysis-of-enclosed-quantum-mechanical-systems
[ouPhD]: https://ougur.iam.metu.edu.tr/publications/theses/boundary-value-problems-for-higher-order-linear-impulsive-differential-equations
